_comment: Role -> recommended skills. Heavy reasoning skills go to the Architect (Claude follows them best). Builder/Worker skills are tight, checklist-style rule sets a weaker Engine can follow. Projects load only their stack subset (e.g. react-native-skills XOR flutter-*).

builder._note: Load only the stack subset for the repo. RN repos: react-native-skills + supabase*. Flutter repos: flutter-* + supabase*.

worker._note: caveman trims output tokens on an already-cheap Engine.
